title: SDF: Interconnection delays for input/output vectors
body:
This PR add support for annotation of interconnection delays for input/output vectors. Previously, only single bit inputs/outputs could be annotated with an interconnection delay.

- Adds a testcase with a 3 bit input and 3 bit output vector

~~Note: This PR depends on #973, I will rebase once it is merged.~~ Rebased
